titleStmt.title: SII 9.65: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 65. (A.R. No. 53 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE TO THE VILLAGE KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 870, Kīlaka, Śrāvaṇa, śuddha pañchamī, Ādityavāra, corresponding to A.D. 947 July 25 Sunday; the year was Kīlaka by the Northern cycle. It refers itself to the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Chalakenallāta Akāḷavarshadēva (Kṛishṇa III) and records that a gift of 62 mattars of wet land, free of tax, made by the Mahājanas of Kuṟuṅgōḍu to the temple of Dēkamma and which had lapsed was regranted by the king at the instance of Rudrarāśi-Bhaṭāra. Lōkayya-Gāvuṇḍa, a pious Brāhman in charge of the locality Kārtikēya-tapōvana, is said to have given an oil mill to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samadhigatapañcamahāśabdama
hāsāmaṁta vijayapaṭaha viśēṣa bhō
gāvatīpuravarēśvaranahīndramaka
radhvajaṁ phaṇīndrakulasaṁbhavaṁ vyāghra
mṛgalāñchanaṁ śrīmadaṟiballadā
granuṁ kuṟuṁgōḍa mūnūrvvarmmahā
janaru voḍetiḻdu dēkammana dēgula
ke kuṟuṁgōḍa poladoḷaṟuvatti rmmatta
rkeyyaṁ sarvapādaparihāraṁgoṭṭu
bhuktānubhōgaṁ bhōgisuttire ya
yyaṇayyana magaṁ puṭigaḷḷantāgedo
ḍe sakanṛpakālātītasaṁvatsarasa
taṁgaḷeṇṭunūṟeḻpattaneya kīla
kasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa sudda pa
ñcaveyādityavāradandakāḷavariṣa
dēva śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakan śrī
matchalakenallātanaḷaṁpuvoḷire ga
ḍḍada rudrarāsibhaṭārarpōgi cakra va
rtiyaṁ kaṇḍaruvattirmmattarkeyyaṁ sarvvā
pādaparihāraṁ sāsanaṁ baḍedar
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasu
ndharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ variṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē kṛmiḥ . paradattasya dharmmāṇāṁ dānāśrē
yōnupālanaṁ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi ta
sya tasya tadā phalaṁ . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kā
lē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ .
sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivē
ndrān bhūyō bhūyō yā ca
tē rāmabhadraḥ . maṅgaḷa mahāśrī .
© svasti samadhigatapañca
mahāśabdha vratajapani
yamahōmasaṁyuktasvāmi
kārttikēyatapōvanādhipa
ti śrīmat mahāmahanī
yyaṁ lōkeyyagāvuṇḍa gā
ṇavaṁ dēkammana dēgulake
sarvvapādaparihāraṁgo
ṭṭaṁ maṅgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
